rows.label: tlk70000016_04_msg0001
rows.name:
You guys haven't just
helped me. You've helped
all sorts of people, huh?

rows.label: tlk70000016_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Er, no, that's not it... I'm not
upset that you're helping people
besides me. That'd be pretty selfish.

rows.label: tlk70000016_04_msg0004
rows.name:
There's someone I really
want to help right now, and
they're all I think of...

rows.label: tlk70000016_04_msg0005
rows.name:
You guys help tons of people, and I
only want to help one, but I can't...
That's what's frustrating me!

rows.label: tlk70000016_04_msg0006
rows.name:
But when I grow up, I'll become
a man as great as all of you!
